title: Property Consultant - Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate!
